LAW AND MOTION 302, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: DOCUMENTS REQUIRED BY THE INVESTIGATIONAL SUBPOENAS ISSUED BY THE MEDICAL BOARD OF CALIFORNIA. PETITIONER DEAN GRAFILO'S PETITION FOR AN ORDER COMPLYING WITH THE INVESTIGATIONAL SUBPOENAS IS OFF CALENDAR AS TO RESPONDENT THE PERMANENTE MEDICAL GROUP, INC. AND GRANTED AS TO RESPONDENT MAMMOTH UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT. THE PERMANENTE GROUP ENTERED INTO A STIPULATION WITH PETITIONER AND THE SCHOOL DISTRICT FILED A STATEMENT OF NON-OPPOSITION. 2 ORDERS ARE SIGNED. (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS) JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR#8600, MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM, NOT REPORTED. =(302/HK)

calendar.matters:
Order To Show Cause Re: Documents Required By The Investigational Subpoenas Issued By The Medical Board Of California
Off Calendar Nov-13-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Lawrence Mercer, Esq. 415-510-3488 of the Office of the Attorney General for Petitioner.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Order To Show Cause Re: Documents Required By The Investigational Subpoenas Issued By The Medical Board Of California.

Petitioner Dean Grafilo's petition for an order complying with the investigational subpoenas is off calendar as to respondent The Permanente Medical Group, Inc. and granted as to respondent Mammoth Unified School District. The Permanente Group entered into a stipulation with petitioner and the School District filed a statement of non-opposition.

2 Orders are signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Not Reported. =(302/HK)
